name: Treasure Data
description: Treasure Data — Enterprise cloud CDP for unifying customer data and activating audiences for marketing campaigns.

seo.title: Treasure Data — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Treasure Data: Treasure Data — Enterprise cloud CDP for unifying customer data and activating audiences for marketing campaigns.

when_to_use: Enterprise CDP unifying customer data for Fortune 500
Marketing audience activation from unified data layer
Customer journey analysis across online and offline data
First-party data monetization via CDP activation
Pre-built ML models for churn and LTV prediction

pros: Mature enterprise CDP with global references
Strong governance, privacy, and ID resolution
cons: Under pressure from composable CDP vendors
review.verdict: Battle-tested enterprise CDP, particularly strong in Japan; conventional packaging in a composable era.
review.best_for: Large enterprises needing a packaged CDP with global scale and strong Japanese support.
review.not_for: Startups, SMBs, or teams committed to warehouse-native composable architectures.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
